name: TODO Frontend Generator
description: Generates a React 18 + Redux Saga + Atomic Design frontend for the TODO app

checks.fail: ❌ todo-app/packages/frontend/ missing — run scaffold lane first

checks.prompt:
You are generating a complete React 18 + Redux Toolkit + Redux Saga frontend for a TODO CRUD app.

Design system: Atomic Design
  atoms/     → smallest building blocks (Button, Input, Checkbox, Spinner, Badge)
  molecules/ → composed from atoms (TodoItem, TodoForm, EmptyState)
  organisms/ → composed from molecules (TodoList, TodoHeader)
  templates/ → page layouts (MainLayout)
  pages/     → full pages (TodoPage)

Stack:
- React 18 with functional components + hooks
- Redux Toolkit (configureStore, createSlice, createAction)
- Redux Saga for async side effects (takeLatest, call, put)
- CSS Modules for styling (one .module.css per component)
- TypeScript strict
- API base URL: /api (proxied to NestJS by Vite)

Todo type: { id: number; title: string; completed: boolean; createdAt: string }

Write ALL the following files using write_file:

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/main.tsx`
  — ReactDOM.createRoot, wraps App with <Provider store={store}>

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/app.tsx`
  — App component: renders <MainLayout><TodoPage /></MainLayout>

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/index.ts`
  — configureStore with todosReducer

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/todos/todos.slice.ts`
  — createSlice with state: { items: Todo[], loading: boolean, error: string|null }
  — reducers: setLoading, setTodos, addTodo, updateTodo, removeTodo, setError

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/todos/todos.actions.ts`
  — createAction for saga triggers: fetchTodos, createTodo, toggleTodo, deleteTodo

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/todos/todos.sagas.ts`
  — Saga workers: fetchTodosSaga (GET /api/todos), createTodoSaga (POST), toggleTodoSaga (PATCH), deleteTodoSaga (DELETE)
  — Use fetch() for HTTP calls inside sagas
  — Watcher: todosRootSaga with takeLatest per action

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/todos/todos.selectors.ts`
  — selectTodos, selectTodosLoading, selectTodosError

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/store/root-saga.ts`
  — all() combining todosRootSaga

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/types/todo.ts`
  — export interface Todo

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/atoms/Button/Button.tsx` + `Button.module.css`
  — variant: 'primary' | 'danger' | 'ghost'; size: 'sm' | 'md'; disabled, onClick

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/atoms/Input/Input.tsx` + `Input.module.css`
  — controlled input, placeholder, value, onChange, onKeyDown

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/atoms/Checkbox/Checkbox.tsx` + `Checkbox.module.css`
  — checked, onChange, label

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/atoms/Spinner/Spinner.tsx` + `Spinner.module.css`
  — simple CSS spinner

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/molecules/TodoItem/TodoItem.tsx` + `TodoItem.module.css`
  — displays one Todo: Checkbox (toggleTodo dispatch), title text, delete Button (deleteTodo dispatch)
  — completed items have strikethrough style

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/molecules/TodoForm/TodoForm.tsx` + `TodoForm.module.css`
  — Input + Button 'Add', submits createTodo action on Enter or click

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/molecules/EmptyState/EmptyState.tsx` + `EmptyState.module.css`
  — 'No todos yet. Add one above!' message

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/organisms/TodoList/TodoList.tsx` + `TodoList.module.css`
  — maps items → TodoItem; shows Spinner while loading; shows EmptyState when empty

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/organisms/TodoHeader/TodoHeader.tsx` + `TodoHeader.module.css`
  — Title 'My Todos' + item count badge

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/components/templates/MainLayout/MainLayout.tsx` + `MainLayout.module.css`
  — centered container, max-width 640px

`todo-app/packages/frontend/src/pages/TodoPage/TodoPage.tsx` + `TodoPage.module.css`
  — useEffect dispatches fetchTodos on mount
  — renders: TodoHeader, TodoForm, TodoList
  — reads from useSelector(selectTodos), useSelector(selectTodosLoading)

Write every .tsx and .module.css file. Every component must be a complete, importable TypeScript module — no placeholder implementations.

checks.fail: ⚠️  No .tsx component files found under src/components
